'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=xf2p1flA1QeWPXxp8x4v0EfXGoRTyYoPm3YywwBORi8-1775041574-1.0.1.1-pP3K1JcIthylAjR6nghac4cYK8NF59ItwlmdrrpFNUY"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
